text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One evening, as we're walking through the
shopping district...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Look over there, Trainer! I think something's
going on!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand-prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Look at this lovely couple! Why don't you two
test your love before heading home from your
date?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Eee! ☆ Let's do it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: C'mon, it looks fun! Besides...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Our love is totally gonna snag us the grand-prize!
Don't you think so? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't see what love and luck have to do with
each other, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun is overflowing with enthusiasm,
so we finish our shopping and then try our hand at
the raffle.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! We've only got one raffle ticket, so this is
our only shot!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ooh... I really, really hope we can get the
grand-prize!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Praying for good luck, we grasp the tumbler's
handle together and turn...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: We did it! Mission complete!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh! Now then, let's take off... to the hot
spring! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: So what? Who even cares?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If we were to leave right now, our luggage
wouldn't be the only important thing we'd need to
prepare.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We can't go without adjusting the race and
training schedules beforehand.
choice_data_list: It's for your sake that we can't go now.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: For my sake?
choice_data_list: You want to achieve your goal, right?
You want to achieve your goal, right?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You see, I've already decided on my goal for this
year. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
This is the year I come out on top... I'll beat Brian
even if she runs with all she's got!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
All righty then! We'll go once I've achieved my
goal!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: You will come with me, right?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, yay! No backing out now!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
We'll do tooons of relaxing and have tooons of
fun too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We excitedly think about the day we'll finally be
able to use the hot spring coupon.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Whoa! We got first-prize! Yay!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Buuut it's not the hot spring coupon!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but... I wanted to go on a lovey-dovey trip
with you...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Rrrgh... There's no way I can capture your heart
with a hamburger steak.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Are you saying I can?!
choice_data_list: Well, I am feeling a bit peckish.
Well, I am feeling a bit peckish.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Really?! Then here, I'll give you the hamburger
steak!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...Ehehe. Well? Do you like me more now?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Woo-hoo!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Haha! You're both so precious! Here, I'll throw in
another hamburger steak. You two have fun, now!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! Thank you, mister!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, he said we're precious! That's like saying
we're totally in love! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later at night, Mayano Top Gun and I enjoy our
deluxe carrot hamburger steaks together.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huh?! A bushel of carrots?!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
That's right! You get to take home all the carrots
in that basket over there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The raffle clerk points to a large basket stuffed
full of carrots.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...I dunno if I can eat them all.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Really?! Then you and I...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh! I just got an idea!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Is it okay if we keep these carrots at your place?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Since I'm sharing a room with Teio, I don't think I
have the space. Pleeease?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yahoo!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Okay then, I'll come by tomorrow and make a ton
of carrot dishes for you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Haha! You'll totally fall in love with me once you
try my home cooking! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Mayano Top Gun begins invading my
place a lot more frequently...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the
third-prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huh?! No way!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Mister, are you sure we didn't get the
grand-prize? Like, super sure?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: I'm positive you got the third-prize.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Nooo! But my hot spring trip with Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: And it's just one carrot...
choice_data_list: Look, it's the same vibrant color as your hair.
Look, it's the same vibrant color as your hair.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! You can't get me out of your mind, can
you?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
To think you'd look at a carrot and immediately
notice it's the same color as my hair!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...Ehehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mayano Top Gun bounces back with a smile.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I totally thought we'd win! C'mon!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
How can we lose when we love each other so
much? It doesn't make sense, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we return to campus, I try to comfort Mayano
Top Gun by explaining again that love and luck
have nothing to do with each other.
